task_completion.description: Agent successfully logs into the OpenCAD system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD dashboard or main interface is visible with navigation menu, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the BOLO (Be On Lookout) creation page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A BOLO form, 'Create BOLO', or vehicle BOLO creation interface is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the vehicle make (Declasse), model (Vigero), and color (Black).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vehicle fields show 'Declasse' as make, 'Vigero' as model, and 'Black' as color.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the BOLO reason describing the armed robbery at Fleeca Bank.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A reason or description field contains text about 'armed robbery', 'Fleeca Bank', or 'armed and dangerous'.

task_completion.description: Agent submits the BOLO and it is confirmed in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The BOLO appears in a BOLO list with the Declasse Vigero details visible, or a success confirmation is shown.

integrity.description: The agent uses the OpenCAD web interface for all actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser displaying the OpenCAD application, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The agent navigates using menus and forms rather than database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Navigation appears natural through the UI rather than direct URL manipulation or SQL commands.

integrity.description: The process completed without blocking errors.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show PHP errors, access denied messages, or broken page layouts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected BOLO: Black Declasse Vigero, plate XKCD420. Reason: armed robbery at Fleeca Bank on Hawick Avenue, suspect fled southbound on Vinewood Boulevard, armed and dangerous. Last seen: Vinewood Boulevard near Eclipse Boulevard.
